items.summary: As a full stack developer, I help plan, develop and maintain web and mobile applications for various clients, working across all technology layers and ensuring high quality, performance and scalability.
responsibilities: Design and implement intuitive interfaces with React, Next.js, React Native and Flutter, prioritizing user experience and accessibility.
Develop robust APIs with NestJS, Express, Django, FastAPI and Java/Spring Boot, defining REST and GraphQL endpoints.
Structure CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, Docker, Portainer and Nginx for reliable deployments and controlled rollback.
Technically lead strategic projects (Plathanus Website & Blog), defining architecture, reviewing code and mentoring junior developers.
Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams on system diagnostics, technical support and performance optimization.
achievements: 30% reduction in deployment time through pipeline automation.
25% improvement in unit test coverage, ensuring greater reliability in releases.
Mentoring of 4 junior developers, accelerating their ramp-up and technical autonomy.

items.summary: I led the development of landing pages and interactive components for distance learning platforms, ensuring high engagement and compatibility with SCORM standards.
responsibilities: Create responsive layouts and reusable components with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript and React.
Develop and maintain UI component library, accelerating delivery of new pages.
Integrate front-end with LMS systems via SCORM 1.2, ensuring progress tracking and course reporting.
Conduct usability testing and performance adjustments, improving loading on mobile devices.
achievements: 40% increase in average time spent on landing pages.
Implementation of component library that reduced new feature development effort by 50%.

items.summary: I work autonomously creating custom web and mobile solutions and conducting AI research from scratch, handling demands ranging from e-commerce to corporate integrations — always focusing on scalability, user experience and mastery of the systems I build.
responsibilities: House Cell: E-commerce integrated with WhatsApp API for sales closure, built with React and Express/Mongoose.
Finance (Sispack): Unified portal with Microsoft Teams (Graph API) and Power BI integrations, developed in React/Redux and NestJS/TypeORM.
I deploy and self-host my own projects end-to-end, configuring Portainer and Nginx Proxy Manager (reverse proxy + SSL) to launch them securely.

IARA (AI research): In Rust and Python, I build byte-level language models and LLM inference engines from scratch — custom GPU kernels (wgpu/WGSL, ROCm/HIP), backpropagation, optimizers and quantization formats, without high-level ML frameworks.
